name: Chocolate Nut Clusters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, place the chocolate chips and vegetable shortening. Microwave on HIGH (100%) for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes or until smooth when stirred.
2. Stir in the nuts.
3. Spoon heaping teaspoonfuls of the mixture into 1-inch paper candy cups or paper-lined mini muffin cups, filling each cup half full.
4. Refrigerate until firm.
5. Peel off the paper cups, if desired.
